Description: The S 8050S is a general-purpose NPN bipolar junction transistor housed in an SOT-23 surface-mount package. It is designed for amplification and switching applications, capable of handling collector currents up to 1.5A. Its key functionality is to provide current gain, where a small base current controls a larger collector current. It is specified as the complementary pair to the PNP SS8550 transistor.

KeyParameters.DC Current Gain (hFE): 120 to 400 (Ranked L, H, J; VCE=1V, Ic=100mA)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Controls the flow of current between Collector and Emitter.
The terminal from which the main current flows out in common-emitter configuration.
The terminal into which the main current flows; connects to the load and supply.
